Hate the new update. All the options that used to pop up when you clicked on NPS (Bank savings, EPF etc) are gone. Those were my favourite portfolio tracking features. The net worth page isn't as clear as those features were. Idk why apps mess with perfection. Also, my EPF account doesn't connect no matter how much I try. Kindly provide manual tracking option for EPF type things so that we can track in some manner at least. And pls provide more clarity on when MF NAV are updated daily. Thanks.

Warning ⚠️ I bought 15 shares ranging from ₹1 to ₹25 and when I sold them they charged DP Charges of ₹14+18% GST on every Share I sold. My wallet balance got in Negative. The problem is that They won't tell you all this before adding funds in your Demat wallet. Everything is hidden beneath FAQ pages if you dig. Invest in Mutual funds to avoid all hidden charges.
